name: Broccoli and Mushrooms in Oyster Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch broccoli, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the broccoli and trim off any flowers. Cut the stalks into diagonal medallions.
2. Heat a wok on high heat and add the vegetable oil.
3. When the oil is hot, add the garlic and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
4. Add the broccoli to the wok and stir-fry rapidly until coated in oil.
5. Once the wok is no longer oily, add a splash of water or chicken stock. Continue to fry, stirring constantly for about 3 minutes, adding more liquid whenever the wok becomes dry.
6. Toss in the mushrooms and stir them into the broccoli.
7. Add the oyster sauce and continue to stir.
8. Cover the wok and simmer at medium heat for two minutes.
9. Serve.
